title: Ground Segment Equipment Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: Ground segment equipment manufacturer attracted through PSAP; co-located with Riyadh SSP and connected to KACST ground station upgrade programme
executive_summary:
Satellite ground segment equipment — S-band, X-band, and Ka-band antennas; telemetry and tracking receivers; ground modem systems; and signal processing hardware — is less technically restricted than space segment hardware and more accessible for manufacturing localisation. Saudi Arabia operates multiple satellite ground stations (KACST Riyadh, SSA ground stations, Arabsat facilities) that currently use imported equipment from European, US, and Japanese manufacturers.

Node SS-3 targets Saudi manufacturing of ground segment equipment: antenna dish structures (steel and composite), RF feed systems, modem hardware, and antenna control systems. The manufacturing processes — precision steel fabrication for antenna structures, electronics assembly for modems, RF feed machining — are accessible to Saudi industrial capability with quality standards upgrades.

Saudi Arabia's addressable ground equipment market — from its own expanding ground station network plus the GCC commercial and government satellite operator market — is estimated at $120–200 million over the Phase I period. A Saudi ground equipment manufacturer with AS9100-equivalent space certification would be competitive across the regional market.

companies.name: ViaSat / EchoStar
companies.rationale: ViaSat supplies satellite modems and ground systems globally. Some ITAR considerations but commercial ground equipment is accessible.

companies.name: General Dynamics SATCOM
companies.rationale: GD SATCOM produces satellite antennas for government and commercial applications. Some ITAR content but antenna structure manufacturing is accessible.

companies.name: Orbit Communications (Israel)
companies.rationale: Orbit produces satellite ground systems including SATCOM-on-the-move. Subject to normalisation.

companies.name: Cobham Advanced Electronics
companies.rationale: Cobham produces RF components and antenna feed systems. Non-ITAR UK technology with international sales.
companies.contact: Cobham VP International Defence and Space

companies.name: Innodata / ND SATCOM
companies.rationale: ND SATCOM produces turnkey ground station systems. Non-ITAR German technology with active international installations.

partners.name: KACST / Ground Station Network
partners.current: Operates Riyadh ground station; some antenna manufacturing experience
partners.upgrade: Saudi antenna structure manufacturing; ND SATCOM technology partnership; AS9100 space equipment certification; KACST as anchor customer for first Saudi-made antennas

partners.name: Arabsat
partners.current: Geostationary ground stations; extensive antenna park
partners.upgrade: Arabsat as anchor customer for Saudi-manufactured replacement antennas; dual-use commercial/government antenna manufacturing

partners.name: Al-Zamil Steel / Precision Division
partners.current: Precision steel fabrication; large structural fabrication
partners.upgrade: Antenna dish structure manufacturing; RF-grade surface finish machining; AS9100 space equipment quality system

partners.name: SAMI Electronics
partners.current: Defence electronics assembly; some RF components
partners.upgrade: Ground modem PCB assembly; RF feed electronics; ND SATCOM licensed modem manufacturing
